message.content:
@startuml
title CSE & Hosted Resources

hide footbox
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor black
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor white
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorBackgroundColor white
  BoxBorderColor black
  BoxBackgroundColor white
}

actor "Notebook\nAE" as Notebook

box "CSE & Hosted Resources" #white
participant "CSE" as CSE
participant "StreetLight-AE-1\nLight-Container-1" as SL1 #orange
participant "StreetLight-AE-2\nLight-Container-2" as SL2 #orange
end box

Notebook -> CSE : <<opt>>
activate CSE

CSE -> SL1 : RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-1/Light-Container-1
activate SL1
SL1 --> CSE : Response
deactivate SL1

CSE -> SL2 : RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-2/Light-Container-2
activate SL2
SL2 --> CSE : Response
deactivate SL2

deactivate CSE
@enduml
